indicators.name: Black and white color scheme
indicators.rationale: The monochromatic color scheme may make the space feel less inviting and relaxing.

indicators.name: Minimalist design
indicators.rationale: A minimalist layout can reduce distractions and promote relaxation.

indicators.name: Hard surfaces
indicators.rationale: Hard surfaces like tiles and wood may not be as comfortable to touch compared to soft materials.

reasoning_summary: The space has a minimalist design which can promote relaxation, but the hard surfaces and monochromatic color scheme may not be as conducive to sleep.
